description_long: This object is a compact, utilitarian submachine gun with a cylindrical barrel and a simple, robust design. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. A prominent, straight detachable magazine extends downward from the lower receiver, and a basic trigger guard is visible. The rear of the weapon features a round end cap, and the top of the receiver is smooth, lacking any advanced sighting systems. The overall silhouette is minimalistic, with no visible stock or foregrip, and the muzzle is plain without any attachments. The weapon's design suggests it is intended for close-quarters use, typical of urban environments.
description: A compact, matte-black submachine gun with a cylindrical barrel, detachable magazine, and minimal external features. The design is simple and utilitarian, lacking a visible stock or advanced sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed directly from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and a hint of the magazine below.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the cylindrical barrel, straight magazine, trigger, and the round end cap at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the round end cap and the back of the receiver, with the magazine partially visible below.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the barrel, magazine, and trigger assembly from the other side.
